channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Trump returns to power after unprecedented comeback, emboldened to reshape American institutions
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Donald Trump, emboldened by his unprecedented political comeback, set to work unraveling Joe Biden ’s legacy Monday as soon as he was sworn in as the 47th president, claiming a mandate to reshape American institutions.
item.dc:creator: ZEKE MILLER, CHRIS MEGERIAN and MICHELLE L. PRICE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Senate passes immigrant detention bill that could be the first measure Trump signs into law
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Fresh off President Donald Trump's inauguration, the Senate on Monday passed a bill that would require federal authorities to detain migrants accused of theft and violent crimes, the first measure he likely will sign into law and giving more weight to his plans to deport millions o
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN GROVES, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Senate confirms Marco Rubio as secretary of state, giving Trump the first member of his Cabinet
item.description: The Senate quickly confirmed Marco Rubio as secretary of state Monday, voting unanimously to give President Donald Trump the first member of his new Cabinet on Inauguration Day.
item.dc:creator: LISA MASCARO, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Gusty winds and extreme fire weather return to Southern California
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Windy and dry conditions returned to Southern California on Monday, raising the risk of new wildfires sparking as firefighters continue to battle two major blazes in the Los Angeles area that started in similar weather nearly two weeks ago.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Slideshow: President's supporters show out in foam cowboy hats and Trump-adorned leggings
item.description: (KRON) – The hat worn by First Lady Melania Trump may have captured the world’s attention at President Donald J. Trump’s inauguration on Monday, but backers of the newly sworn-in 47th president also made bold fashion statements in his honor—both at his pre-inauguration rally and on Inauguration Day.
item.dc:creator: Tor Smith, KRON4

item.title: Bitter cold spreads across much of the US as Texas and the South brace for rare winter storm
item.description: Frigid temperatures engulfed the South on Monday ahead of a winter storm that's expected to spread heavy snow and disruptive ice around a region from Texas to north Florida that rarely sees such weather, sending residents rushing to insulate pipes, check heating systems and stock up on emergency sup
item.dc:creator: SARAH BRUMFIELD, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Symbol of unity? Inauguration news coverage illustrates differences that pull country apart
item.description: Presidential inaugurals frequently symbolize what binds Americans, a quadrennial celebration of a peaceful transition of power.
item.dc:creator: David Bauder, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Miranda V. Arizona: The Supreme Court case that made the Miranda Rights
item.description: In 1966, the Supreme Court ruled that police must inform suspects of their Miranda Rights before speaking about the incident, following the case of Miranda V. Arizona in 1963, in which a suspect was denied legal representation and his constitutional rights were violated.
item.dc:creator: Adoreil Ayoubgoulan, Fox 5

item.title: Second Trump win represents a 'new America,' political experts say
item.description: (KRON) -- On Monday, former President Donald Trump was inaugurated as president for the second time, completing a remarkable political comeback.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Ohio State VS. Notre Dame: Facts to know before the CFP Championship kickoff
item.description: The Buckeyes and Fighting Irish meet Monday night in the College Football Playoff national championship game at Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: Orri Benatar, KREX 5

item.title: Mt. Denali to be renamed Mt. McKinley, Trump says
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) — President Donald Trump announced that he would be renaming Alaska's Mt. Denali, the highest peak in North America, as part of his first-day actions in office during his inauguration. "We will restore the name of a great president, William McKinley, to Mt.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Rodriguez, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Lawmakers side-eye billionaire CEOs getting prime Trump inauguration seats
item.description: Billionaire tech CEOs Jeff Bezos of Amazon, Mark Zuckerberg of Meta, Sundar Pichai of Google, Tim Cook of Apple, and Elon Musk got prime seats at President Trump’s inauguration in the Capitol rotunda — peeving lawmakers in both parties.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Cardinal Dolan, Franklin Graham pray at Trump’s inauguration
item.description: “Mr. President, the last four years, there were times I’m sure you thought it was pretty dark. But look what God has done,” Rev. Franklin Graham said.
item.dc:creator: Susie Pinto, NewsNation

item.title: Longtime Planned Parenthood head Cecile Richards dies at 67
item.description: Cecile Richards, the former president of Planned Parenthood, died at the age of 67 on Monday after a battle with cancer.
item.dc:creator: Sophia Vento, WFLA, NBC

item.title: WATCH: Carrie Underwood sings 'America the Beautiful' a cappella after apparent tech issue at inauguration
item.description: An apparent technical issue didn't stop Carrie Underwood from delivering "America the Beautiful" during the second inauguration of President Trump on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, KRON4

item.title: Melania Trump hat: What people had to say about Inauguration Day fashion
item.description: Of all the things that people could be talking about on Inauguration Day, it didn't take long for people to latch onto the attire of Melania Trump, with one point of discussion taking the lead: her hat.
item.dc:creator: Brian Farrell, KRON4

item.title: Texas man gets 14-years after unknowingly selling drugs to DEA
item.description: DEA agents executed a search warrant and found nineteen firearms, more than $34,000 in cash and approximately 23 pounds of drugs.
item.dc:creator: Julianna Russ, NewsNation

item.title: Trump administration sued over DOGE as soon as swearing-in over
item.description: President Trump’s new "Department of Government Efficiency" (DOGE) was sued multiple times before his inauguration ceremony in the Capitol Rotunda concluded. In the moments after Trump’s swearing-in, three lawsuits were filed in D.C.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump to sign executive orders live at Capital One Arena
item.description: President Donald Trump is set to sign executive orders in front of a live audience at Capital One Arena.
item.dc:creator: Libbey Dean, NewsNation

item.title: WATCH: Donald Trump, JD Vance sworn into office
item.description: Donald Trump was sworn in as the 47th president Monday, promising a “revolution of common sense” and taking charge as Republicans assume unified control of Washington and set out to reshape the country’s institutions.
item.dc:creator: ZEKE MILLER, CHRIS MEGERIAN and MICHELLE L. PRICE Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Costco workers authorize nationwide strike
item.description: Thousands of Costco workers nationwide voted Sunday to authorize a strike if a contract is not reached by the end of the month.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, KTLA 5

item.title: Biden commutes sentence of Native American activist Leonard Peltier
item.description: President Joe Biden on Monday commuted the life sentence of activist Leonard Peltier, who was controversially convicted of murdering two FBI agents, within the final hour of his presidency.
item.dc:creator: Zack Budryk, KRON4

item.title: Biden pardons family members in final minutes of presidency
item.description: President Biden announced pardons for members of his family in the last minutes of his presidency, a development that came as President-elect Trump’s inauguration was already underway.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, NewsNation

item.title: Bills will face Chiefs in AFC title game; Eagles will host the Commanders in NFC championship game
item.description: Josh Allen and the Buffalo Bills will take on Patrick Mahomes and the Kansas City Chiefs in the AFC championship game for their fourth playoff matchup in five years. Allen ran for two touchdowns and the Bills beat Lamar Jackson and the Baltimore Ravens 27-25 in a divisional game on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Biden pardons Fauci, Jan. 6 committee ahead of Trump inauguration
item.description: (The Hill) -- President Joe Biden granted pardons to several prominent public servants Monday who have faced attacks from President-elect Donald Trump in one of his final acts in office. Biden issued pardons for Dr.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Massachusetts officials suspect bird flu killed dozens of birds in Plymouth
item.description: Massachusetts officials suspect more than 60 birds found dead in Plymouth died from bird flu, though official results may not come for days.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 5 takeaways from Trump's inauguration eve rally
item.description: President-elect Trump on Sunday rallied with supporters in Washington, D.C., on the eve of his second inauguration, taking a victory lap and teasing an expected barrage of activity on his first day in office. Here are five takeaways from Trump’s rally at Capital One Arena.
item.dc:creator: Julia Mueller, WGN 9

item.title: Missouri lawmakers are going after voter-approved abortion rights. Voters will likely reelect them
item.description: JEFFERSON CITY, Mo. (AP) — Voters in Missouri last election approved a constitutional amendment that promised to undo the state's near-total abortion ban.
item.dc:creator: SUMMER BALLENTINE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Most voters in new survey seek toned-down Trump agenda
item.description: Over 60% of Americans polled disagree with Trump's idea to replace thousands of career civil-service workers.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, WGN 9

item.title: Eggs are about to get even more expensive, expert says. Here's how much
item.description: Eggs are nearly 40% more expensive now than they were a year ago, the Labor Department said this week. It's about to get even worse, one expert says.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, ABC 4

item.title: Wisdom of a California grandmother, 90, goes viral amid Eaton Fire tragedy
item.description: A nearly 90-year-old California woman who lost her home to the Eaton Fire is going viral for pragmatism and positivity in the face of so much adversity.
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, WFLA, NBC
